chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1201 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For hearing of CMA No.4788/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No. 4789/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.4790/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 ************** 1. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Accordingly, urgency application stands dismissed. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. Learned AAG, present in Court in other matters, has waived notice and placed on record the case diary dated 03.07.2025, generated on CFMS-DC, which reflects that the final challan has been submitted and the case is now fixed for framing of charge. In view of the above circumstances, the present petition, being not maintainable, stands dismissed in limine. However, the applicant is at liberty to avail alternate remedy for appropriate relief, if so advised. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
